input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.12.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.12.3.2
            TITLE: the brake test passes if all four wheels lock while the tractive system is shut down

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.12.3.2: The Brake Test passes if all four wheels lock while the Tractive System is shut down
IN.12.3.2 The Brake Test passes if all four wheels lock while the Tractive System is shut down

final_answer: The Brake Test passes if all four wheels lock while the Tractive System is shut down
